# Helios Robotics — Engineering Org Structure

Helios Robotics is headquartered in Boston, with a satellite office in Austin.

Maya Chen leads the Platform Team. The Platform Team owns the shared infrastructure that every product team at Helios depends on.

Diego Ortega leads the Vision Team. The Vision Team is based out of the Austin office and focuses on perception and computer vision.

Wei Zhang leads Fleet Operations. Fleet Operations runs the production robot deployments at customer warehouses.

Anika Patel is the VP of Engineering at Helios Robotics.
